My Story

I teach what
I practice.

Digital Marketing Educator · Strategist · Builder

I construct, audit, and teach high-converting digital marketing platforms. Rather than relying on simple theory, I design functional campaigns and automated lead infrastructures that convert traffic directly into revenue opportunities.

Biography

My professional journey began in outbound sales, dialing international campaigns for healthcare and trade companies. This early experience in direct sales taught me a fundamental lesson: conversion is the only metric that matters.

"I don't just teach theory — I run live campaigns while I teach them."

Wanting to optimize the sales pipelines I was working on, I dove into search engines, digital metrics, and targeting architectures. Self-trained and subsequently certified at NDMIT, I transitioned from executing sales calls to orchestrating full digital infrastructures.

This blend of real-world outreach and system construction led to academic roles. Today, I teach digital marketing at NDMIT and ASDC Kanpur, passing down structured execution models to hundreds of professional students.

"Every automation I build saves someone hours every week."

Outside lecturing, I work as an active consultant building customized lead acquisition engines, managing local business advertising profiles, and setting up automated workflows that centralize operations.

Work Infrastructure
